Relationships

held in:New York, New York, United States
main performers:Billy Joel (lead vocals)
rescheduled as:2018‐07‐18: Madison Square Garden, New York City, NY, USA (2018-07-18) (Billy Joel)
held at:Madison Square Garden in Midtown Manhattan, New York, New York, United States
shot for:(Your Love Keeps Lifting Me) Higher and Higher (live, 2009-10-29: Madison Square Garden, New York City, NY, USA) by Bruce Springsteen & The E Street Band with Darlene Love, John Fogerty, Sam Moore (singer, ex "Sam and Dave"), Billy Joel and Tom Morello
recording location for:Live Through the Years by Billy Joel
performance of:12 Gardens Live by Billy Joel
part of:Madonna at Madison Square Garden, New York City (order: 3)
setlist.fm:https://www.setlist.fm/setlist/billy-joel/2018/madison-square-garden-new-york-ny-13eb8185.html [info]
premieres:52nd Street

subseries of:The Rebel Heart Tour
